textEn: May the hands of Abū Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he.
textTranslit: Tab bat yadaa abee Lahabinw-wa tabb

textAr: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
textEn: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.
textTranslit: Maa aghna 'anhu maaluhu wa ma kasab

textEn: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame
textTranslit: Sa yas laa naran zaata lahab

textEn: And his wife [as well] - the carrier of firewood.
Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber.
